description: Tests sync partial updates triggered by form input

browserSteps.expected: No results - enter a search term

browserSteps.value: window.fetchLogs = []; window.origFetch = window.fetch; window.fetch = function(url, opts) { var body = opts && opts.body ? opts.body : null; window.fetchLogs.push({url: url, body: body}); return window.origFetch.call(window, url, opts).then(function(response) { var headers = {}; response.headers.forEach(function(v, k) { headers[k] = v; }); return response.clone().text().then(function(text) { window.fetchLogs[window.fetchLogs.length - 1].response = text; window.fetchLogs[window.fetchLogs.length - 1].headers = headers; return response; }); }); };

var form = document.querySelector('form[partial_mode="sync"]'); var fd = new FormData(form); var obj = {}; for (var entry of fd.entries()) obj[entry[0]] = entry[1]; if (obj.query !== 'hello') throw new Error('FormData query=' + obj.query);

browserSteps.expected: No results - enter a search term
